title: The One With The Free Porn

lines.text: Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is watching TV, and we hear Mr. Treeger in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Mr. Treeger
lines.text: Ohhh, man!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (coming in from his bedroom) What is that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Treeger's snaking the shower drain.

lines.speaker: Mr. Treeger
lines.text: What in the name of hell?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe he found you flip-flop.
Joey sits down and changes the channel, and we see two people making out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa! Is this porn? What did I do? I must've hit something on the remote.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do we pay for this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, we didn't even pay our cable bill-maybe this is how they punish us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe we shouldn't pay our phone bill-free phone sex.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe we shouldn't pay our gas bill? (Stops and thinks about what he just said.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Treeger
lines.text: (coming in from the bathroom) Whoa, hey, that lady's all kinds of naked.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, Joey just pressed something on the remote and it just, came on!

lines.speaker: Mr. Treeger
lines.text: Yeah, it happened to me once. I was just flipping through the channels and bam! It was like finding money.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Like finding money with naked people on it!

lines.speaker: Mr. Treeger
lines.text: Then I made the mistake of turning off the TV, I never got it back again. And I'm sad. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Chandler) Why would he turn off the TV? (Chandler shrugs.)
Opening Credits

Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, later that morning. The porn is still on, there are three women getting ready to shave the chest of some guy. Joey and Chandler are wondering why that guy is letting them shave his chest, and Monica and Rachel are eating breakfast at the foosball table.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, y'know what, come on, do we really have to watch this while we eat? (She makes a move for the remote.)

lines.speaker: Joey and Chandler
lines.text: (stopping her) Oh no-no-no-no!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We don't know what could make this go away.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, so no one touches the remote. And no one touches the TV!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And no one touches the air around the TV!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Imagine a protective porn bubble if you will, okay?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well at least, I'm going to mute it.

lines.speaker: Joey and Chandler
lines.text: Oh no-no-no! (Monica mutes the TV and they tentatively look behind them)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We still have porn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering, carrying her massage table) Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, what are you doing? That's too heavy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Give it here. (She takes the table.) Oh, God. (And gives it to Monica right away.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh, I'm getting too pregnant for this, lugging around a stupid massage table. Y'know, I have to find a job where I carrying a smaller table. (She goes over and stands in front of the TV.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Or a job where you don't have to carry a table.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You mean like a doctor?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pheebs! You're blocking the porn! Look out!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! (She moves.) Oh my. Oh, that reminds me, I have to see my OB-GYN today.
Chandler and Joey's erm, Monica and Rachel's, Ross is entering.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So uh, Emily just went to the airport.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh. Why didn't you take her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh, her-her uncle already had planned on doing it. And y'know, we-we said our good-byes this morning, so...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You must feel horrible. Hey! The guys have free porn!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Thinks about it.) Nah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, cheer up! You're gonna see her again, right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I, that's the thing, I don't know! I mean, whenever I brought it up with her she said, (In a British accent.) "This is so fantastic! Why do we have to talk about the future? Let's just enjoy..."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (interrupting him) No-no-no, don't-don't do the accent. You've got to see her again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And why do you care so much?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because! You could get to live out my fantasy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You had fantasies about Emily?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! Y'know, the fantasy! Meet someone from a strange land, fall in madly love, and spend the rest of your lives together.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is that why in junior high you were the only one that hung out with that Ukrainian kid?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah that, plus his mom used to put sour cream on everything!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ahh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you love her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We said it was only going to be two weeks, y'know?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You love her!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What-what is love really?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohhh, I knew you loved her! Then you need to go to the airport and tell her. You're probably just gonna catch her just as she's about to go to the gate. You're gonna call out her name and say, "I love you!" And she's gonna say, "I love you, too!" And you guys are going to have the most amazing kiss, everyone at the gate will applaud.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I am a good kisser.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then you two can, can sneak into the cockpit, and things will start to heat up, and then a stewardess comes in... (Ross looks at her.) I've been watching too much porn.
Beth Israel Medical Center, Phoebe is at her OB-GYN doing an ultrasound, Rachel is with her. We here the baby's heartbeat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Is that the heartbeat?

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: That's it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow! This is so cool.
The heartbeat changes, and we hear a different one.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Have we talked about the possibility of multiple births?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why don't take care of this one, and should I get pregnant again, I'll hold onto your card, okay?

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: No, I'm getting three separate heartbeats.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Three? You guys were worried I wouldn't even have one!

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Doctors are wrong all the time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, so, are-are you sure that there are three?!

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Definitely. (Points out each head on the ultrasound.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! Oh my God! Oh my God!! So I-I mean so in a few months I'm going to have three full grown babies just walkin' around inside me?! Oh! Oh! And it's gonna be one of those log rides where they just come shooting out!

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Actually, giving birth to three babies isn't that different from giving birth to one.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What do you know?!
Central Perk, Phoebe is there, waiting to tell Frank and Alice the news.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: (entering) Oh-oh, Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh! Hi!

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Hi! (She runs over and hugs Phoebe's stomach.) So, how did it go at the doctors?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh well, okay, hey, y'know how when you're umm, you're walking down the street and you see three people in a row, and you say, "Oh, that's nice?"

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, yeah well, good news, you're going to have three babies.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Three babies?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: I finally got my band!

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: We're gonna have a big family, I've always wanted a big family!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh God, I'm so glad you guys are happy, I was so afraid you were going to be all freaked.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Why would we be freaked?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no maybe 'cause it's harder to raise them, and the added expense, and...

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: (They're less than happy now) Oh.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, back to happy. Back to happy!

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: No-no-no, no, it's going to be fine. Because umm, because I teach Home Ec, and uh, I can have 30 kids making baby clothes all year long. Y'know it'll-it'll be like my very own little sweatshop.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, I've been thinking ever since you said we were having triplets, the best thing for me to do is to drop out of college and get a job.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: No, Frank.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No you can't quit college! No! You're in college? Really?

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, refrigerator college.

lines.speaker: Alice
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: Yeah, y'know when we found out we were going to have a baby, y'know I figured y'know like I should y'know have like a career-and I love refrigerators!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You can't give up on your dream.

lines.speaker: Frank
lines.text: No, it's okay. We're-we're gonna have three kids! And that's-that's a different kind of dream. Three kids and no money.
The airport, Emily is getting ready to board her flight to London.

lines.speaker: Ticket Agent
lines.text: (On the P.A.) This is the boarding call for Flight 009.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Emily! (Runs up.)

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Oh my God! What are you doing here? (They hug)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just, I had to see you one more time before you took-off.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: You are so sweet. (They kiss.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's, that's, that's a big candy bar. (She's holding one of those huge Toblerone bars.) I had the most amazing time with you.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Me too.

lines.speaker: Ticket Agent
lines.text: This is the final boarding call for Flight 009.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Well, that' me. (They kiss again.) Here, have this. (She gives him the candy bar.) I'm only allowed one piece of carryon anyway. (She starts towards the jetway.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (stops her) Wait uh, listen. I-I, I have to tell you something. Umm, I've been thinking, I'm just gonna come out and say it. Okay? I-I-I ah, I-I think I love you.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Oh. (She's shocked and hugs him.) Thank you. (She boards the plane.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's no problem.
Commercial Break
Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, Rachel is singing some kind of song.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What's that song? It has been in my head all day long.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's the theme from Good Will Humping.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know who doesn't even like dirty movies? My new boyfriend Joshua.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, he told me. He prefers to leave certain things to the imagination.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh-oh, yeah, and did he also say that ah, some of the dialogue was corny and that he actually found it was funny and not sexy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, he likes porn.
Rachel starts to leave.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Where ya going?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm going to find out if he really thinks supermodels are too skinny. (As she exits, Phoebe enters.) Hey, Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How did it go with Frank and Alice?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, Frank has to quit college because his super fertile sister is having three babies! I need to make a lot of money really fast, and I had an idea that I want to talk to you (Points to Chandler) about, 'cause you work for a big company. Okay, insider trading, what information is there that you can give me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They don't really talk to us about that kind of stuff. I can get you some free white out though.
Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh! Did you do what I said? Did-did-did you tell her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I did.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And well, what did she say?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, you're totally welcome! What'd she say?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She said, "Thank you." I said, "I love you." And she said, "Thank you."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Whoa-whoa, wait a minute, did you say, you love her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, what were you trying to get her to do?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What do I do now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You play hard to get.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She already lives in London.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Then you go to Tokyo.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right look, forget it, forget it. You told her you love her, it's over.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It is not over! You're over!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Pause) Good one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It is not over because she is going to call you and tell you she loves you. And the reason why she couldn't, is because her feelings were so strong, it scared her. Now you go home and wait for her call, she could be calling you from the plane! Come on now go! Go! (Tries to push Ross out the door.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay! Okay! But if she doesn't call, it is definitely over! No, wait. Wait. Unless, eventually, I call her, y'know just to she what's going on, and, and she says she'll call me back, but then she doesn't. Then it's over.
Joey holds his fist up, and Chandler gives him two thumbs up.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Way to be strong, man!
Ross leaves, and after the door closes, Joey gives him the loser sign.
Chandler and Joey's erm, Monica and Rachel's, Chandler and Joey enter having just woken up.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi! Listen, can we watch cartoons on your television? We need a porn break. We spent the last two hours watching In & Out & In, Again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, so, why don't you just turn it off?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because then we would be the guys who turned off free porn.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering carrying a case) Ooh, good, you're hear! Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, what-what 'cha got there?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh this, well I'm glad you asked. (She opens the case and removes a knife and an soda can.) Now, don't you hate it when you have to cut a tin can with an ordinary steak knife? (She efficiently cuts it in half.) Ahh! Now, I know what you're thinking...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Pregnant Woman Slays Four?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, they didn't make you pay for those knives, did they?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, you're not gonna make enough money to help Frank and Alice just by selling knives.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No-no, I know that, but I just have to make enough money for the second part of my plan.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's the second part of your plan?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My Saturn dealership.
Ross's bedroom, he has fallen asleep waiting for Emily to call. He is awaken by the phone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Answers the phone.) Hello?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Emily, hi! Uh, how-how was you flight?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: It was dreadful. I felt terrible about how I acted when you said those wonderful things.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no, that-that, that's all right. Umm, I'm just glad you called.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Ross umm, there's something that I've got to tell you, there's-there's someone else.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Does that mean the same thing in England as it does in America?
Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, Ross is relating his recent conversation with Emily to the gang.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She doesn't know which one of us she wants, me or this Colin guy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This isn't how it's supposed to go, there can't be another guy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Of course there's another guy!! This is even more perfect! Now you have to prove your love!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm not proving anything. Okay, I'm done listening to you. If I hadn't let you talk me into going to the airport in the first place, I never would've put my fist through the wall!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You put your fist through the wall?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I missed and hit the door. But, it opened really hard!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You have to go to London!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, you have to go fight for her!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, sure, that makes sense. Yeah. 'Cause you already told her you love her and she didn't say it back, then she called you and told you that there's another guy, so yeah, go to London that'll scare her!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: When Rachel was with Paulo, what did you do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I made fun of his accent.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You sat back and let him have her, you didn't fight at all. Am I right? Do you want the same thing to happen with Emily?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right then, go fight for her! Go to London! I mean, that could be you and Emily! (Points to the TV.) That, but-but nicer. Just, go to London!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on! Surprise her! Show up at her doorstep! Don't let her go without a fight!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right. All right, I'm gonna do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm gonna, I'm gonna go to London and I'm going to fight for her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, good luck!
Ross starts to leave.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ross! Ross! If you're going to the airport, could you pick me up another one of those Toblerone bars? (Chandler nods his head no.)
Chandler and Joey's erm, Monica and Rachel's, Monica, Joey, and Chandler are sitting and talking as Phoebe and Rachel enter.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh-Ooh! I did it! I did it! I figured out a way to make money! I'm gonna open up my own massage place and Frank's gonna help me! And! We can work it around his schedule so he doesn't have to quit school!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's sounds great, but how are you going to afford it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, we were walking down the street and we saw that van that you guys used for catering and we realised...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm telling it! I'm telling it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. You know how people need transportation, but they also need massages to help them relax so I just figured we could combine the two, okay, I give the massages and Frank drives! I can fix up the van, bolt the table in the back, and you know what I've got?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: A place where no one will ever get out alive?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Think about it, it's a taxi that people take when they need to relax, it's...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (interrupting) Relaxi-Taxi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: The name was my favourite part!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, well I can up with it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YOU DID NOT!!!! Oh! No! You came up with Relaxi Cab! That's not good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I...
The phone rings and Monica answers it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on phone) Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Ross, are you in England? Was Emily surprised?
[Cut to Ross in one of those British phone booths.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, because she hasn't come home yet. And she hasn't been home all night! She's obviously staying with that other guy, and I'm the stupid moron who spent the whole night outside her apartment!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right. When is, when is the next flight out?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: About four hours.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, just stay there a couple more hours and if she doesn't show up by then, then just come on home.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, tell him about Relaxi-Taxi, and-and ask him if he thinks that's better than Relaxi Cab.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, it's not Relaxi Cab. It's Relaxicab, like taxicab.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, that is better.
Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, later that same night. There is a knock on the door and Chandler answers it to reveal Emily standing behind it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are we in London?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing here? You can't be here!

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: I've uh, I've come to talk to Ross.
She sets her bag down on the foosball table and Joey sees the Toblerone bar sticking out of it and gazes longingly at it.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pause) Nothing. No, nothing.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: I was going to call him, but...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, you came to tell him you love him! I knew it! (Points at Chandler) I was right! (Points to Emily) I'm right, right?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: I'd really rather talk to him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: I uh, I've been to his apartment and he wasn't there, and uh. I need to talk to him, so do you have any idea where he is?

[Cut to London, we sit Ross sitting outside Emily's apartment. We hear Emily's phone ring with amazing clarity. Apparently, sound travels quite easily through the walls of British buildings. Anyhoo, Ross looks around for the ringing phone and in the meantime Emily's answering machine picks up and once again with amazing clarity we hear Emily say...]

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Ross, are you there? Ross, I don't know if you can hear this but... (Ross has moved to the window, apparently so that he can hear better.) I'm gonna talk anyway, uh, I'm in the States with you sister and your friends and it's all over with Colin. I came here to tell you that, and to tell you-Yes, Joey you can have all the chocolate you want, just take it! Uh, I came here to tell you that I love you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (yelling, thinking Emily can hear him through the answering machine all the way to New York.) I love you too! I'm, I'm gonna call you right now from the phone booth! (Realises) You can't hear me. (Goes to make his call.)

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: I wish I could know if you'd heard any of that. I suppose I've either just told you I love you or given my neighbours a good laugh. Mrs. Newman if you're listening, bugger off this in none of your business. I suppose there's not much chance you did heard that, and there's the call waiting so, I should go. Oh well. (Answers the call waiting.) Hello.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Ross, I love you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ohh! Thank you.
Closing Credits
Monica and Rachel's erm, Chandler and Joey's, Joey is still watching the porn as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was just at the bank, and there was this really hot teller, and she didn't ask me to go do it with her in the vault.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Same kind of thing happened to me! Woman pizza delivery guy come over, gives me the pizza, takes the money, and leaves!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What, no, "Nice apartment, I bet the bedrooms are huge?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Noo! Nothing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know what, we have to turn off the porn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I think you're right.
Goes over and picks up the remote.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, ready?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: One.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Two.

lines.speaker: Both
lines.text: Three.
Chandler turns off the porn and sets the remote down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's kinda nice.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, that's kinda a relief.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Pause.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna see if we still have it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.
Chandler turns on the TV and...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: FREE PORN!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We have free porn here!!!
